description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle in manual mode was slowing (with brake lights illuminated) in bumper-to-bumper traffic on westbound Sagamore St. 
approaching Orizaba St. when it was struck from behind by a following vehicle (vehicle 2). There was minor damage apparent to the hood 
of the striking vehicle and no damage to the Zoox vehicle. There were no injuries and police were not called.
Print
Clear Form
